text.title: llamaindex-hybrid-retrieval Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the input profile satisfy preconditions (required drivers: corpus_heterogeneity, latency_target_ms, rerank_budget_usd)?

conclusion.verdict: Profile incomplete — return structured error, do not guess defaults.

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND corpus_heterogeneity == 'high' or corpus_heterogeneity >= upper_threshold AND latency_target_ms == 'advanced'

conclusion.verdict: Pick the advanced/strict variant — see core rules for the precise wiring.

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND corpus_heterogeneity == 'high' or corpus_heterogeneity >= upper_threshold AND latency_target_ms != 'advanced'
profile.valid == true AND corpus_heterogeneity == 'low' or corpus_heterogeneity < upper_threshold

conclusion.verdict: Pick the low-tier default variant — cheaper, simpler, fewer guarantees.
